title: Katarn Clan

{{Quote|If you are of the Katarn Clan, you are stealthy. You draw the Force around yourself as a cloak, taking footsteps in silence.|[[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Fae Coven]]|<ref name="TJP" />}}
The '''Katarn Clan''' was one of the many [[Clan (Jedi)/Legends|clans]] that prospective young [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiates]] were placed in when they first began to learn the ways of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Members of this clan were selected based on their proclivity for stealth. Once a member of the clan, the students would travel together through the [[Jedi academy|academy]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] until the time they [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduated]].<ref name="TJP" />

Named after the [[Katarn/Legends|katarns]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], this clan was stationed at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] following the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Producing many students over the centuries, specifically [[Jedi Shadow]]s, the clan was dissolved along with the rest of the Order in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].<ref name="TJP" />
